stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning the tropopause is correct?

options.a: The temperature lapse rate and pressure lapse rate both change abruptly at the tropopause.
options.b: The temperature lapse rate changes abruptly at the tropopause.
options.c: The temperature remains constant above and below the tropopause.
options.d: The temperature of the tropopause at the equator and at the poles is equal.
